title: Calendar Month View - Consistency with Week View

assertions.step: Navigate /calendar and verify Week view displays correctly
assertions.expected: Week view shows 7 columns (Mon-Sun); rooms sorted ascending
assertions.actual: Week view loaded; 7 date columns; rooms in order: 120, 229, 1000, 1200 (ascending) ✓

assertions.expected: Month view displays full calendar grid; same room sort order maintained
assertions.actual: Month view loaded; 4 weeks displayed; rooms in same order: 120, 229, 1000, 1200 (ascending) ✓

assertions.step: Verify rooms sorted ascending in Month view (consistent with Week view)
assertions.expected: Room order identical in both views
assertions.actual: Room header order in Month view = Room header order in Week view ✓ (consistent)

assertions.step: Verify same booking bars appear with identical positioning
assertions.expected: Bar positions for same booking identical in both views (same date range, same cells)
assertions.actual: BK_ABC123 (Jun 27-30) appears in same cell range in both views; no position variance ✓

assertions.step: Verify status colors match week view
assertions.expected: Bar colors identical: blue (CONFIRMED), orange (CHECKIN), gray (CHECKED_OUT)
assertions.actual: Month view bar colors match Week view: CONFIRMED=blue, CHECKIN=orange, CHECKED_OUT=gray ✓

assertions.step: Verify no bars bleed past end-date column
assertions.expected: Bar ends exactly at checkout date; no overflow
assertions.actual: All bars in Month view end cleanly at checkout date boundary; no bleed ✓

notes: File coverage: src/components/Calendar.tsx:181-320. Calendar Month view consistency verified. Room sort order, bar positioning, and status colors match Week view. No regression detected.
